summary: Plan-only classification for hydrated cluster refs. The hinted representative #91596 and security-signal refs #91001, #91010, #91170, and #91596 are routed to central security handling per the job notes. The remaining non-security items split into separate memory-index identity subfamilies: #91660 is the clearest open provider.model backfill PR, #90447 is superseded by already-merged #90816, and local modelPath follow-up PRs remain related but not merge/close candidates in this plan.
